cleavage agent: the protein sample (120 μg) was digested using trypsin (Promega) at 37°C overnight.
fractionation method: The extracellular proteins were isolated using ammonium sulfate fractionation (30∼60% ammonium sulfate saturation)...
fragmentation method: the top 40 precursors of the highest abundant in the full scan were fragmented using higher energy collisional dissociation...
instrument: Peptide samples were injected and analyzed using a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer...
labeling: Label-free quantitative LC-MS/MS was performed to study the soluble extracellular proteins of Vibrio sp. A8.
